properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've heard all the stories Hundreds of times The light and the glory The wonders and signs I never imagined Or dared to believe That something so holy Could happen for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But standing here with you No way I could deny The God who walked on waves Sent you to change my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I used to think Miracles had to be Water turned to wine Or the parting of the sea But when I look in your eyes I see Heaven break through And it's making me believe My miracle is you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My words can't explain it But my heart knows it's real 'Cause my broken pieces Have started to heal Like truth for a doubter Like sight for the blind Your love shows me power From something divine

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, I used to think Miracles had to be Water turned to wine Or the parting of the sea But when I look in your eyes I see Heaven break through And it's making me believe My miracle is you Ooh, it's you, Ooh, ooh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Somehow you were the answer To all the prayers I prayed I guess that's what they meant by Mysterious ways

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yeah, it's easy to believe My miracle is you Ooh, it's you
